REALITY DEFENSE

// CENTURION STAND //

The veil has torn open above the Outpost Veridian. Pouring from the rift come the Vermin — serpentine parasites with gaping radioactive maws that devour the souls of the living. You are the last Centurion Guard Trooper still standing. Hold the line.
A / D or ← → · MOVE    W / ↑ / SPACE · JUMP
MOUSE · AIM    CLICK or J · CHAINGUN FIRE
